cellar_purge_game.description: Cellar Purge (Isaac-style) — single-player top-down twin-stick roguelite. WASD moves; arrow keys fire tear projectiles in cardinal directions. Five rooms in a cross layout (start → combat → shop / east-combat / boss). Combat rooms spawn zombies on entry; boss room spawns the Cellar Wretch. Loot drops on clear: coin, heart, key, fire-rate shard. Step on the green exit pad after the boss to escape.
